case_title: ERIC MICHELS VS. GUSTO CALIFORNIA, INC

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER ERIC MICHELS REQUEST.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ERIC MICHELS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT GUSTO CALIFORNIA, INC IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-31-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-02-2024 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ERIC MICHELS IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT GUSTO CALIFORNIA, INC.
